member.name: T:MatrixMath
member.summary: Class containing matrix math utility methods.

member.name: M:MatrixMath.MultiplyScalar(System.Double[0:,0:],System.Double)
member.summary: Multiplies a matrix by a scalar and returns the resulting matrix.
member.param: The scalar value to multiply by.
member.returns: The resulting matrix, or a matrix containing -1 if invalid input.
